channel.title: KhataBook on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in KhataBook on Tech Tracker

item.title: Khata Book - Digital Ledger Account Book ?
item.description: ** <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-HFCarvUxQV0/XlanllQn8sI/AAAAAAAABLw/-d6ygak5hxcWWY6NTxXC_Nh_KwoWPAspQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/IMG_20200226_224336_920.jpg" alt=""> ** ** Tech** Tracker | Khata Book - Ledger Account Book is primarily focuses on Indian audience as it can be replace the old traditional physical book with this digital app for multiple purposes and simple usage within your smartphone. - Khata Book Features • 100% Free & Secure. • Free SMS to your customers on every transaction. • Automatic and Secure Online Backup • Create Personal Khata Books
